name: AI Memory Distillion - Facts & Episodic Events

parameters.query:
=SELECT 'notion_pages' AS source_table, id, title, cleaned_content, created_time AS event_time FROM m_staging.notion_pages WHERE (last_edited_time >= '{{ $('Ingestion Date Range Parameters').first().json.start_date }}' OR created_time >= '{{ $('Ingestion Date Range Parameters').first().json.start_date }}')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'substack_posts' AS source_table, id, title, cleaned_content, published_at AS event_time FROM m_staging.substack_posts WHERE published_at >= '{{ $('Ingestion Date Range Parameters').first().json.start_date }}'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'linkedin_posts' AS source_table, id, '' AS title, cleaned_content, published_at AS event_time FROM m_staging.linkedin_posts WHERE published_at >= '{{ $('Ingestion Date Range Parameters').first().json.start_date }}' LIMIT 10;

=INSERT INTO m_episodic.memory_events (event_name, event_description, event_timestamp, actors, source_table, source_id, outcome)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.event_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.event_description.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.event_timestamp }}',
  '{{ $json.actors }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.source_table }}',
  '{{ $json.source_id }}',
  '{{ $json.outcome.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
);
